feed.title: The Moon Exports - News Feed
feed.subtitle: Latest news and updates from The Moon Exports - Premium handicrafts exporter from Sambhal, India
feed.rights: Copyright 2015-2025 The Moon Exports. All rights reserved.

entry.title: Premium Buffalo Horn Plates - Latest Collection
entry.summary: Discover our latest collection of premium buffalo horn plates in various natural colors and finishes. Perfect for fine dining establishments and luxury tableware.

entry.title: Natural Antibacterial Buffalo Horn Bowls
entry.summary: Our handcrafted buffalo horn bowls offer natural antibacterial properties and stunning grain patterns. Ideal for restaurants, hotels, and decorative use.
